title: Chart supported in excel
author: vcomplyRahul
body:
I'm using google chart in excel to show different chart visualization data. Currently I'm having issue in using all charts in the excel so it would be very helpful if you could help me with this. like what are the different libraries you provide that can help me out with this issue.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/68936695/102476545-422aeb80-4081-11eb-895d-d9e030227bf8.png)

comments.author: ghosTedBuddy
comments.body: @vcomplyRahul https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/1173 is describing there isn't yet chart support what i learned the hard way... it wipes all existing charts too...

comments.author: ambekar92
comments.body:
> I'm using google chart in excel to show different chart visualization data. Currently I'm having issue in using all charts in the excel so it would be very helpful if you could help me with this. like what are the different libraries you provide that can help me out with this issue.
> ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/68936695/102476545-422aeb80-4081-11eb-895d-d9e030227bf8.png)


We are looking for MS Excel file with a graph it should export the file using exceljs npm

comments.author: GlennStreetman
comments.body:
Ambekar92,
I'm dealing with a similar issue and I just got something working a few days ago inspired by this [post](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/64473898/why-are-the-charts-in-excel-deleted-if-i-export-the-data-with-exceljs)

If you have a .xlsx file that contains your source chart, you might be able to copy it. [copy-excel-chart](https://www.npmjs.com/package/copy-excel-chart)

This has barely been tested so you could always use it as a code example or post to pull/issues WHEN you run into an issue.

Good luck!
